title: update-validation-tests
summary: Verified that tasks 04/05/06/07/08 had already brought the entire fast validation suite (13 `scripts/tests/test-*.sh` files) into alignment with the new JWT/OIDC default auth path; added one missing "idempotent intent" assertion to `test-configure-vso-jwt-auth-validation.sh` and confirmed zero failures/no stale TokenReview-as-default wording across the whole suite.
keyLearnings: - Because each prior task's spec required updating its own test file alongside its script change, essentially all of task 09's nominal deliverables (`test-configure-vso-jwt-auth-validation.sh`, `test-apply-vso-demo-validation.sh`, `test-setup-vso-cluster-validation.sh`, `test-verify-two-cluster-validation.sh`) were already complete and correct by the time this task ran — task 09 in this run was primarily a verification pass plus one small gap fill (idempotent-enable-guard assertion, now 21/21 in that file).

- Scope boundary: `vso-demo.sh` (root demo narration script) and `presenterm/vso.md` deck content belong explicitly to task 10 (`update-demo-scripts-docs-and-deck`), not task 09. `vso-demo.sh` still narrates the old TokenReview/`auth/${VSO_AUTH_MOUNT}` path today — this is a known, deliberately deferred gap for task 10, not a task 09 regression, since `test-vso-demo-validation.sh` only asserts the variable name generically (no hardcoded stale text) and doesn't need a task-09 fix.

- Tasks 09 and 10 have no `depends_on` relationship and run concurrently in the same working tree — confirmed live via `.ralpi/progress.json` showing task 10 `in_progress` with uncommitted edits to `README.md`/`PODMAN_MIGRATION.md` while this task ran. Committed only the specific files changed here (`git add <files>`, not `-A`) to avoid capturing another in-flight task's work.

- All 13 `scripts/tests/test-*.sh` suites pass (186 total assertions), with no test expecting `auth/kubernetes-vso` as the default VSO path and no test depending on a default reviewer JWT — both are correctly gated behind `ENABLE_TOKEN_REVIEWER_AUTH=1`/kept as legacy-compat only.
blockers: none — all acceptance/validation criteria for task 09 met (fast validation suite passes fully

VaultAuth regression to `method: kubernetes` is caught). Task 10's live update to `vso-demo.sh`/`presenterm/vso.md` (in progress concurrently) is the next dependent and was intentionally left untouched.
